entities.name: NORTH AFRICA
entities.description: A region in Africa focused on reducing agricultural greenhouse gas emissions to meet climate action commitments.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: Atmospheric emissions from agricultural activities that contribute to global warming.

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A framework designed to increase agricultural productivity and resilience while reducing greenhouse gas emissions.

entities.name: MITIGATION
entities.description: The process of reducing the emission of greenhouse gases or enhancing their sinks.

entities.name: PRISMA-INSPIRED SYSTEMATIC REVIEW
entities.description: A systematic approach to literature review used to analyze the establishment of CSA practices in North Africa.

entities.name: SOIL QUALITY
entities.description: The capacity of soil to function as a vital living ecosystem, which is a focus for emission reduction.

entities.name: ENTERIC FERMENTATION
entities.description: The digestive process in livestock that releases methane, a potent greenhouse gas.

entities.name: GHG SEQUESTRATION
entities.description: The process of capturing and storing greenhouse gases to mitigate their impact on the atmosphere.
